content: Resume optimization tools like Jobscan, Resume Worded, Teal, SkillSyncer, and Enhancv provide: (1) Match Score - percentage indicating how closely resume aligns with job posting, calculated via keyword matching, semantic analysis, weighted scoring, and frequency/placement analysis. Jobscan targets 75% match rate. Resume Worded scores out of 100. Enhancv runs 27 checks. (2) Gap Analysis - identifies missing hard skills, soft skills, keywords, education requirements, and certifications by comparing resume to job description. (3) Section-by-Section Feedback - per-bullet-point analysis (Resume Worded), formatting checks (Jobscan), macro and micro level feedback. (4) Auto-Optimize - SkillSyncer auto-inserts job-relevant keywords. (5) ATS-Specific Detection - Jobscan detects which ATS the job uses and tailors recommendations. (6) Job Tracking - Teal and Enhancv organize tailored resumes per application. No tool provides robust resume versioning or side-by-side comparison of different resume iterations.
